titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 188: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 188. (A.R. No. 40 of 1888.) MĀMAṆḌŪR, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records a gift of 45(1/2) sheep for burning half-a-lamp to the god, Vālīśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēvar at Naraisiṅgamaṅgalam (situated to the) east of (the tank) Chittiramēgha-taṭākam by (two individuals), Nāṭṭaḍiyaṉ, son of Ādibhusaṅka seṭṭi, a merchant of Tiruvaṇṇāmalai, (situated on) the northern (bank of) Peṇṇai river, who contributed for quarter lamp and Sāttakuṭṭivīraṉ, a shepherd (maṉṟāḍi) who contributed the other quarter. It is also stated that the said lamp was to be burnt during the day time. Further it records that those who thought of harming the (gifted) sheep would incur the sin of having committed it between Ganges and Kumari.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. IV No. 138.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmakki yāṇṭu
[10 5] cāvatu cittiramekataṭākattiṉ kiḻ na
raiciṅkamaṅkalattu vālīśvara(m)muṭaiya ma(ā)
haādevarkku vāṇakappāṭip peṇṇai vaṭaka
rait tiruvaṇṇāmalai viyāpāri Ātipucaṅ
kac ceṭṭi makaṉ nāṭṭaṭiyaṉ vaitta viḷakku kā
lum maṉṟāṭi cāttakuṭṭi viraṉ vaicca viḷak
kuk kālumāka Araiviḷakkukkum vaicca cāvā
muvāpperāṭu nāṟpattaiñcarai Ivai pa
ṉ māheśvararakṣai .. Ivvarai viḷa
kkum pakalerippatākavum Ivvāṭṭuk
kut tiṅku niṉaittāṉ keṅkai Iṭai
kumariyiṭaic ceyta pāvaṅ koḷvān .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
